title: Foul Potion
description:
Deal [blue]12[/blue] damage to ALL players and enemies.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.
notes: In combat, deals 12 damage to all enemies and players. Outside combat, can be used at a Merchant or Fake Merchant event to gain 100 gold instead of dealing damage. Usable anytime, not just during combat rounds.
